name: Reflex Happy Hour Cat Treat Calmness 60g
shortDescription: Give your feline friend a tasty moment of relaxation with Reflex Happy Hours Cat Treats – Calmness . These deliciously crunchy rewards are specially crafted to support your cat’s emotional wellbeing while satisfying their natural cravings. Packed with essential nutrients and high-quality animal proteins, each treat delivers both flavor and functional benefits.
description: Give your feline friend a tasty moment of relaxation with Reflex Happy Hours Cat Treats – Calmness . These deliciously crunchy rewards are specially crafted to support your cat’s emotional wellbeing while satisfying their natural cravings. Packed with essential nutrients and high-quality animal proteins, each treat delivers both flavor and functional benefits. Enriched with cranberry, marigold extract, borage oil, flaxseed , and yucca schidigera , this calming formula helps promote a sense of ease—perfect for winding down after playtime or easing common daily stressors. The crunchy texture also contributes to good dental hygiene, helping maintain clean teeth with every bite. Whether you’re rewarding good behavior or sharing a loving moment, these treats make every hour a happy—and calmer—hour. Key Features Supports calm behavior and emotional balance Crunchy texture helps maintain dental health Rich in vitamins, minerals & taurine for overall wellbeing Made with high-quality protein sources Free from artificial additives Ingredients Processed lamb protein, Processed animal protein, Maize, Rice, Maize gluten, Chicken fat, Liver flavor, Powdered cellulose, Vitamins and minerals, Brewer's yeast, Salt, Cranberry, Marigold extract, Borage oil, Linseed, Yucca schidigera, Xylooligosaccharides (XOS), Taurine (3a370), Preservatives and antioxidants (E320 & E321). 📊 Nutritional Analysis Component Amount Crude Protein 32% Fat Content 16% Crude Fiber 8% Ash 3% Moisture 10%   Feeding Recommendations Intended as a complementary food for adult cats Can be served in a single portion daily Adjust intake according to weather, lifestyle, and activity level Ensure constant access to clean, fresh water Store in a cool, dry place and reseal packaging after use Not suitable for human consumption Product size & color may vary due to natural ingredient characteristics Make treat time a calming and enjoyable bonding moment—because your cat deserves a peaceful Happy Hour every day! 😺💛
